title: Who we're building for.
lede: Who they are. And what changes for them.

personas.name: Decision maker
whoAreThey: Holds the budget — the bottleneck or the enabler for org-wide AI adoption.
Could be from any department: Marketing, IT, Sales, Projects…
IT persona leading the tech stack in the organization.
Executives such as CIO, COO, CMO, VP of Operations or HR.
personas.whatTheyCareAbout: Leverage AI to increase organizational efficiency and business outcomes — without runaway spend or risk.

personas.name: End user — technical
whoAreThey: Hands-on builder, lives in agents and integrations.
Speaks the technical language: MCP, APIs, webhooks.
Wants depth and control over what agents can do.
personas.whatTheyCareAbout: Agents that scale with their org's stack — no black boxes.
personas.messagingGoal: Prove technical depth — show MCP, APIs, and BYOA in action.

personas.name: End user — business
personas.whatTheyCareAbout: Agents that make their week lighter — without setup or technical lift.
personas.messagingGoal: Show real outcomes and concrete day-to-day examples.

personas.name: Investor
whoAreThey: Watches for market signal and execution proof.
personas.whatTheyCareAbout: Vision-to-execution: monday delivering on the AI Work Platform promise.
personas.messagingGoal: Signal momentum, scale, and a defensible market position.

useCases.name: One flow for lead generation
useCases.pain: My lead-gen pipeline spans 5 tools (capture, enrichment, SDR agent, Slack, CRM) — keeping data in sync is a nightmare.
useCases.solution: One workflow connects every platform and agent via MCP; data flows end to end and stays tracked in monday.

useCases.name: Use case #2
useCases.pain: Customer pain — short, first-person, quoted from a real conversation.
useCases.solution: How this launch resolves the pain — one sentence, concrete.

useCases.name: Use case #3
useCases.pain: Customer pain — short, first-person, quoted from a real conversation.
useCases.solution: How this launch resolves the pain — one sentence, concrete.

beforeAfter.description: From isolated agents to a team that ships together — in full view.
From locked-in tools to an open ecosystem — agents plug in, monday plugs out.
From risky adoption to confident rollout.
